description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is on the Favorite Team page

steps.action: WHEN the user scrolls to highlight one of the following teams: BOS, CIN, DET, LAA, MIL, NYY, SD, STL
steps.result: THEN the app should say 'The {selected team} is highlighted. Press select to save this team as your favorite team. Move in any direction to continue to highlight teams to favorite.'
